title: T-029 — DLQ replay + resolve Server Actions (§12.6, §11.6 V-FIN-INT-05)
prompt:
# T-029 — DLQ replay + resolve Server Actions

PRD: docs/prd/10-FINANCE-PRD.md §12.6 Ops UI FIN-006 actions; §11.6 V-FIN-INT-05 DLQ permanent errors require manual resolution.
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Server Actions for D365 DLQ operations: `replayDlqEvent(id, {reason})` (requeues with fresh UUID v7 idempotency_key) and `resolveDlqEvent(id, {resolution_notes})` (terminal close, no requeue). RBAC: `fin.dlq.replay` / `fin.dlq.resolve` from T-001. Audit + outbox round-tripping.

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/app/finance/dlq/_actions.ts`:
   - `replayDlqEvent(dlqId, {reason})` requires `fin.dlq.replay`:
     - Read d365_finance_dlq row; verify status='pending resolution' (not already resolved).
     - If `error_category='permanent'` AND user role does NOT include `admin`, raise 'Permanent errors require admin replay (V-FIN-INT-05)'.
     - Generate new UUID v7 idempotency_key.
     - INSERT new finance_outbox_events row with status='pending', target_system='d365_f&o', payload from DLQ row, idempotency_key=new.
     - UPDATE d365_finance_dlq SET resolved_at=now(), resolved_by=actor, resolution_notes='REPLAY: ' || reason.
     - audit_events row 'dlq_replay'.
     - Return new outbox event_id.
   - `resolveDlqEvent(dlqId, {resolution_notes})` requires `fin.dlq.resolve`:
     - Validate resolution_notes.length >= 30 (per MODAL-09 translation note).
     - UPDATE d365_finance_dlq SET resolved_at=now(), resolved_by=actor, resolution_notes.
     - audit_events row 'dlq_manual_resolve'.
2. `apps/web/app/finance/dlq/_actions/list.ts`:
   - `listDlq(filters)` Server Action: returns paged DLQ rows; RBAC `fin.dlq.replay` OR `fin.dlq.resolve`.
   - `getD365Health()` Server Action: returns last_successful_post + 24h error_rate from finance_outbox_events aggregation.
   - `triggerManualConsolidation()` Server Action: calls T-028 daily_consolidator out-of-cycle; requires `fin.dlq.replay` + admin.
3. Zod validation: replay reason min 20 chars; resolve notes min 30 chars.

## Files
- apps/web/app/finance/dlq/_actions.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/dlq/_actions/list.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/_lib/dlq-schemas.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/finance/dlq/_actions/__tests__/dlq-actions.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria (Given-When-Then)
- Given user without fin.dlq.replay, when replayDlqEvent called, then ForbiddenError; no DB write. AND given DLQ row error_category='permanent' and non-admin user calls replay, when invoked, then error 'Permanent errors require admin approval'.
- Given replayDlqEvent succeeds, when finance_outbox_events queried, then new row with fresh UUID v7 idempotency_key and status='pending'; DLQ row marked resolved_at + resolution_notes prefixed 'REPLAY: '. AND given already-resolved DLQ row, when replay/resolve called, then error 'DLQ already resolved'.
- Given replay called with reason length 15, when Zod validates, then it rejects (min 20). AND given resolveDlqEvent called with notes length 25, when Zod validates, then it rejects (min 30 chars required).
- Given resolveDlqEvent succeeds, when DLQ row queried, then resolved_at populated; NO new outbox row. AND given successful replay/resolve, when audit_events queried, then row with action='dlq_replay' or 'dlq_manual_resolve'.
_(AC count consolidated from 8→4 by Fixer F13 2026-05-14 (no coverage lost))_

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: dlq-actions.test.ts seeds DLQ rows with various error_categories and user roles; exercises permanent-gating, replay idempotency, resolve no-requeue, validation, already-resolved guard, audit emission.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run apps/web/app/finance/dlq/_actions/__tests__/dlq-actions.test.ts`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow non-admin users to replay permanent-category DLQ (V-FIN-INT-05 strict).
- Do not reuse the original idempotency_key on replay — must be a fresh UUID v7.
- Do not resolve and replay in one action — they're mutually exclusive terminal paths.
- Do not skip Zod min-length on reason/notes — audit clarity.
- Do not block on the user-facing action while consolidator runs (`triggerManualConsolidation` is fire-and-forget via worker enqueue).
- Do not log D365 credentials or full payload contents.

pipeline_inputs.description: Server Actions: replayDlqEvent (fresh UUID v7, gated by admin for permanent), resolveDlqEvent (terminal close), listDlq, getD365Health, triggerManualConsolidation.
pipeline_inputs.details: Permanent-category DLQ rows can only be replayed by admin (V-FIN-INT-05 strict). Replay generates fresh UUID v7 idempotency_key. Resolve is terminal — no new outbox row. Reason/notes min-length enforcement via Zod. [AC count consolidated from 8→4 by Fixer F13 2026-05-14 (no coverage lost)]

Given replayDlqEvent succeeds, when finance_outbox_events queried, then new row with fresh UUID v7 idempotency_key and status='pending'; DLQ row marked resolved_at + resolution_notes prefixed 'REPLAY: '. AND given already-resolved DLQ row, when replay/resolve called, then error 'DLQ already resolved'.

Given replay called with reason length 15, when Zod validates, then it rejects (min 20). AND given resolveDlqEvent called with notes length 25, when Zod validates, then it rejects (min 30 chars required).

Given resolveDlqEvent succeeds, when DLQ row queried, then resolved_at populated; NO new outbox row. AND given successful replay/resolve, when audit_events queried, then row with action='dlq_replay' or 'dlq_manual_resolve'.
